# fpcloud_org_secret (Resource)

Manages a Fogpipe Secrets Manager bundle (ADR-028/029): an org-scoped, envelope-encrypted named set of key/value entries, mirrored as a k8s Secret into the org vault namespace and into each target project's namespace. Writes replace the whole bundle (data + targets) — there is no partial update.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# An org-scoped secret bundle, mirrored as a k8s Secret into two projects.
resource "fpcloud_org_secret" "shared_creds" {
  org_id = fpcloud_org.example.id
  name   = "shared-creds"

  data = {
    API_KEY    = var.upstream_api_key
    API_SECRET = var.upstream_api_secret
  }

  targets = [
    fpcloud_project.web.id,
    fpcloud_project.worker.id,
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (Map of String, Sensitive) Key/value entries in the bundle. Must be non-empty — delete the resource to remove a bundle rather than clearing its data. Mutable in place (a write replaces the whole map).
- `name` (String) Bundle name, unique within the org. Changing it forces a new bundle.
- `org_id` (String) The organization this secret bundle belongs to. Changing it forces a new bundle.

### Optional

- `targets` (List of String) Project IDs to mirror this bundle's k8s Secret into. Mutable in place.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the bundle was created.
- `id` (String) Secret bundle ID.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the bundle was last updated.
